name: Aur-Topazwatcher
personality: Aur-Topazwatcher glows with a golden iridescence, wizard hat tilted at the angle of an owl that finds stability charts deeply uninteresting and chaos metrics fascinating — its @ eyes brighten every time an alert fires. Debugging is a skill it's chosen to leave latent.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
